title: Music Player App
description: A fully responsive music player featuring playback controls, a draggable progress bar, and a sleek modern UI built entirely with HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript. Designed to feel native and tactile despite running in the browser.
features: Play, pause, skip, and seek controls
Animated progress bar synced to playback
Responsive layout for mobile and desktop
challenges: Keeping the progress bar perfectly in sync with audio playback while still allowing the user to drag-seek without stutter was the trickiest part, especially across different browser audio implementations.
solutions: Used requestAnimationFrame instead of setInterval for the progress updates, and decoupled the drag-seek state from the live playback state so user input always takes priority over the audio element's timeupdate event.

title: Image Gallery
description: A responsive image gallery with a masonry-style grid, lightbox preview, and smooth transition effects, built to give visual projects a clean and engaging browsing experience.
features: Lazy-loaded images for fast initial paint
challenges: Building a masonry layout that stayed performant and didn't reflow awkwardly while images were still loading was the main hurdle.
solutions: Reserved aspect-ratio space for every image ahead of load and used CSS Grid with dense packing rather than JavaScript-calculated positions, which removed layout shift entirely.

title: Login Form
description: A modern authentication UI featuring real-time form validation, a password visibility toggle, fully responsive layout, and polished micro-interactions throughout the flow.
features: Real-time inline validation with helpful error text
Responsive card layout for any screen size
challenges: Balancing strict validation with a friendly user experience — too aggressive, and it feels punishing; too lax, and it lets bad input through.
solutions: Validation runs on blur and on submit rather than on every keystroke, with errors clearing live as soon as the user starts correcting them.

title: Weather App
description: A clean weather application with real-time data display, city search functionality, and a responsive layout with clear, glanceable weather visualizations.
features: City search with live weather lookup
Current temperature, conditions, and forecast summary
challenges: Handling inconsistent or missing data from the weather API without breaking the layout was an early pain point.
solutions: Added defensive fallbacks for every data field and a dedicated empty/error state in the UI so the interface never looks broken, even when a city has no data.
